decision_trace.executed_decision_reasoning_summary: The current evidence shows an active attack (attack_active=true) that has successfully reached the cloud stage (path_stage=3). The attacker path is confirmed and highly relevant. Although D1 (quarantine_sen4) has the highest baseline utility, the previous defense was D3 (isolate_edge2_gw_for_sen4), which failed to stop the progression. To maximize security gain while maintaining a reactive containment posture, we must select a strong isolation measure. Both D1 and D4 offer high expected security gains (0.82). Since D3 was already used on edge2_gw, selecting D4 (isolating edge2_vm_s4) provides complementary defense coverage at the next critical point in the path, increasing overall resilience without repeating the exact previous action.
